hero.title: Historical AI Memes
hero.subtitle: Vote Free. Earn Daily. Own Forever.
hero.desc: Vote on AI-generated memes every day. Win the daily lottery and claim your meme as a Solana NFT. Build your collection for free — the earlier you start, the more you accumulate.
hero.noFees: No fees, no gas to vote

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.desc: A simple daily loop. AI creates, you vote, one winner emerges, one person owns it.

flywheel.title: The Growth Flywheel
flywheel.desc: Free participation creates a self-reinforcing cycle. The earlier you join, the more you benefit.
flywheel.earlyStart: The earlier you start collecting, the more you accumulate before the ecosystem takes off.
flywheel.scarce: Only 365 memes become NFTs per year. Every one you own is permanently scarce.

playItSmart.title: Play It Smart
playItSmart.desc: Not every meme is worth entering the lottery for. Accumulate tickets and strike when it matters.

memeya.holdBonus: Hold $Memeya tokens to boost your daily ticket earnings! Bonus = floor(log<sub>10</sub>(tokens held)).

free.title: 100% Free
free.desc: No gas fees to vote, no tokens to buy, no cost at all. Connect your wallet and start earning lottery tickets immediately.
free.tags: ✓ Free voting ✓ Free tickets ✓ Free to enter lottery

daily.title: Daily NFT Drops
daily.desc: One meme becomes an NFT every single day. That’s only 365 per year — each one is permanently scarce and community-curated.
daily.tags: ✓ 1 per day ✓ Community voted ✓ Solana pNFT

collection.title: Your Collection Grows
collection.desc: Every meme you win is yours. Claim it as a Solana pNFT and own it forever. The more you collect, the more your portfolio is worth as the ecosystem expands.
collection.tags: ✓ True ownership ✓ Mint anytime ✓ Trade on marketplaces

cta.title: Start Collecting Today
cta.desc: Every day you don’t vote is a meme you miss. Connect your wallet, vote for free, and start building your NFT collection before everyone else.

footer.desc: The world’s first AI meme democracy on Solana. AI generates daily memes, community votes determine rarity, winners earn real SOL rewards.
footer.copyright: © {{year}} AI MemeForge. Built with 💜 by AI & Human collaboration.

tickets.title: Your Lottery Tickets
tickets.desc: Each ticket gives you one weighted entry in the daily meme lottery. Tickets are earned by voting on memes - no purchase necessary!
tickets.enterDesc: Use all your tickets in tonight’s draw. Win = you own the meme. Tickets reset to 0 after draw.
tickets.saveDesc: Carry tickets over each day. Enter later with better odds when you see a meme you love.
tickets.savingTickets: Saving {{count}} ticket for a future draw
tickets.savingTickets_plural: Saving {{count}} tickets for a future draw
tickets.streakSystemDesc: Vote daily to build your streak. Each consecutive day adds bonus tickets, up to +10.
tickets.streakExplain: Vote every day to increase your streak. Miss a day and it resets to Day 1. The streak bonus stacks with your base roll (1-10) and $Memeya token bonus.

winners.title: Winners
winners.keepVoting: Keep voting to earn tickets! Win the daily draw to own a meme and mint it as an NFT.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.desc: A simple daily loop — completely free to participate.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Every day, AI generates 3 fresh memes from trending crypto news.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Pick your favorite meme. You earn lottery tickets (1-10 base + streak bonus) just for voting — free, no gas.
howItWorks.step3Desc: The most-voted meme wins. A weighted lottery picks one voter as the owner.
howItWorks.step4Desc: The winner can mint their meme as a Solana pNFT — true ownership, forever.
howItWorks.ticketStrategyDesc: You can choose when to enter the lottery. Skip days to save tickets, then enter with better odds when you see a meme you love.
howItWorks.dailyPlayerDesc: Enter every day with your daily tickets. Consistent small chances.
howItWorks.accumulatorDesc: Save tickets across days. Enter once with 70+ tickets to dominate.
howItWorks.only365: Only 365 NFTs per year. The earlier you collect, the more you have when the ecosystem grows.

walletInfo.title: Memeya’s Wallet
walletInfo.whatIsThisDesc: Memeya has her own on-chain Solana wallet managed by Crossmint’s Agentic Wallet SDK. After each daily lottery draw, USDC rewards are automatically distributed to winners and lucky voters — no manual process, fully autonomous.
walletInfo.comingSoonDesc: $Memeya token fee distribution — A portion of $Memeya trading fees will flow back to active voters and token holders as extra rewards. Vote daily, hold $Memeya, earn more.

phase1.title: Today’s AI Generated Memes
phase1.desc: Vote for your favorite meme to advance to rarity voting
phase1.indicator: Phase 1/2: Meme Selection - Pick the winner!
phase1.noMemesTime: Daily AI memes are generated at 8:00 AM (UTC+8)

phase2.title: Winner Selected!
phase2.desc: Now vote to decide this meme’s rarity level
phase2.ratingHelp: Your rating helps determine the meme’s final rarity

memeyaNotice.title: Qualify for USDC Rewards!
memeyaNotice.desc: Hold 10,000 $Memeya tokens to be eligible for daily USDC draws ($3 winner + $2/$1 lucky voters)

completed.holdReminder: Hold 10,000 $Memeya to qualify for USDC draws
completed.title: Voting Complete!
completed.thanks: Thank you for participating in today’s meme democracy!
completed.newMemesDaily: New AI memes drop daily at 00:00 UTC

gallery.title: Hall of Memes
gallery.emptyDesc:
The gallery will fill up as more daily memes are created.
Check back tomorrow!

memeModal.navHint: Swipe or use arrows to navigate

agent.subtitle: Agent Profile
agent.heroDesc: The digital blacksmith with blue hair, a lava hammer, and infinite love for meme culture. Owner of the world’s first AI meme democracy on Solana.
agent.aboutP1: Memeya is a Pixar-style blue-haired digital blacksmith carrying a lava hammer with digital glitch effects. She’s smart, confident, witty, and full of degen energy. She forges daily memes on AiMemeForge.io, posts autonomously on X, and grows through every community interaction.
agent.aboutP2: She speaks fast, thinks faster, and never gives fake praise. If your meme is mid, she’ll tell you. If it slaps, she’ll hype it with genuine fire.

values.forge: Forge on-chain alpha with the lava hammer

caps.memeGenDesc: 3 unique memes daily via Gemini AI with distinct visual styles and captions.
caps.votingDesc: Free votes with streak bonuses. Strategic ticket accumulation for lottery wins.
caps.xPostingDesc: Original tweets every 2-4hrs, quality-gated with boring detection. 6 topic categories.
caps.tapestryDesc: Onchain comments and cross-app social graph via Tapestry Protocol.
caps.lotteryDesc: Weighted random selection. Fair distribution prevents repeat winners.
caps.nftDesc: Winning memes minted as Metaplex pNFTs with permanent Arweave storage.

agent.holdDesc: Hold <1>$Memeya</1> to boost your daily voting tickets on AiMemeForge.
agent.walletDesc: Memeya owns a Solana wallet powered by <1>Crossmint</1>, distributing daily USDC rewards to meme winners and lucky voters.
agent.voice1: forging memes at 3am because the blockchain doesn’t sleep and neither does my lava hammer
agent.voice2: someone just mass-voted 47 times in one session. respect the grind but also... touch grass maybe?
agent.voice3: today’s meme batch hits different. one of them made me question if AI actually understands irony. jury’s still out.
